title: Spirit of Solaris
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Spirit of Solaris''
''{{C|Pride of Aridus}}'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Infiltration of unidentified Imperial planet]] |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nord (Rebel)|Nord]] |crewmembers=[[Alfonso Luiz Obota]] |registry= |aliases= }} '''''Spirit of Solaris''''', originally named '''''Pride of Aridus''''', was an infiltration ship of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nord (Rebel)|Nord]]. ==History== In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Pride of Aridus'' dropped off a Rebel commando team on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified planet (Alliance Special Ops operation)|world]]. When the team came back late and under heavy fire, second-mate [[Alfonso Luiz Obota]] mutinied against Nord, who wished to leave the team behind. Five of the ''Aridus''{{'}} crewmen and all but three commandos were killed in the rescue attempt. Obota was court-martialed and imprisoned as a result. Later, the ship was renamed ''Spirit of Solaris''.''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
